parallelPathsNote: Two paths: run the 7-minute AI diagnostic, or book a 30-minute founder-led demo with Remington.
headline: You built your business.
subheadline: Five people with the right AI outperform thirty without it. That's not a prediction. It's happening now.
action: Knock down your workload. One agent at a time.
ctaSecondary: Talk to it. Right now. On this page.
problem1: You spent last week on email, follow-ups, scheduling, and status updates. The week before that too. The most valuable person in the company, doing work that doesn't need a human.
problem2: You've hired VAs. You've tried ChatGPT. You've bought software that promised to change everything. Nothing you've tried actually does the work.
problem2emphasis: It just gives you another dashboard to check.
problem3: The companies winning right now aren't working harder. They're delegating to agents.
shift1:
We believe business owners should do the thing they set out to do. Not the rest.

So we build agents. Not dashboards. Not chatbots. Agents that do the actual work — answer your calls, follow up your leads, manage your schedule, catch what you'd miss. Each one built on how your business actually runs.
shift2: Each agent starts by listening. Within a week, it starts doing. Within a month, it works in your voice. Within six months, you wonder how you ran the business without it.
chatHeadline: See it for yourself. Talk to it.
chatSubheadline: Tell it who you are. In seven minutes, it'll show you the first agent you should build — the one task that's costing you the most time right now. Keep the results whether you work with us or not.
bookDemoHeadline: Prefer to talk to a human first?
bookDemoText: Book a 30-minute founder-led demo with Remington and see your business reviewed live.
marcusEngelDetail: Marcus was losing deals to agents who simply picked up the phone faster. His agent acts as a virtual receptionist — it knows every listing, qualifies leads, answers property questions, and books viewings directly into his calendar. Missed calls dropped from 34% to 2%. Closed deals per quarter nearly doubled.
lutzDetail: Lutz was drowning in 47 spam emails a day. His agent learned who matters, intercepts noise before it hits his inbox, and handles unsubscription — including re-enrollment monitoring. Now he gets 0–2 spam per day. Hasn't missed a single legitimate email in three months.
franziskaDetail: Franziska's team vacation planning was chaos — WhatsApp messages, paper calendars, coverage gaps. She connected Slack to her agent with custom escalation rules she defined herself. Scheduling conflicts went from weekly to zero. Coordination time dropped from 3+ hours to 20 minutes per week.
dirkDetail: Dirk was spending 4+ hours daily researching prediction markets manually. His agent continuously scans 200+ markets, scores arbitrage opportunities, and presents risk-bounded position briefs. Research time dropped to 15 minutes. Paper portfolio return: +23.4% over six months.
startFreeDesc: Talk to the AI on this page. Seven minutes. It'll identify the first agent you should build. Keep the results no matter what.
doneWithYouDesc: Strategy and implementation roadmap. You'll know exactly what to build, why, and in what order.
fullBuildDesc: Production implementation starts here. Your first agent, built and deployed.
createAccountCarryContext: Create account and keep your audit progress
personalNote: "I'm not an AI consultant. I'm a technologist who builds private AI. The difference is I use mine every day to run a real business. Not a deck. The thing."
whyNotCallText: You've sat through enough discovery calls to know how they work. Fifteen minutes of “tell me about your business,” then thirty minutes of pitch. We don't do that. The AI you just talked to is the discovery. It asked you five questions and identified your first agent. That's more value than most consultants provide in a paid engagement. If you want to work together, start a conversation. If you don't, keep the results. They're yours.
whyAgents: Why agents instead of more software?
whyAgentsText: Every tool you add is another thing that doesn't know what the other things know. You end up being the integration layer — the human middleware between twelve systems that can't talk to each other. An agent doesn't sit next to your tools. It does the work your tools can't. It doesn't need you to check a dashboard. It follows up, schedules, answers, and escalates. You review the results.
iphoneDesc: Your agents in your pocket. Voice-first. Ask anything about your business on the go.
macosDesc: Deep work. Document review. Strategy sessions with your agents beside you.
androidDesc: Your agents on Android. Full capability. Same context. Wherever you are.
agentsEverywhereTagline: Private AI. Same agents. Same memory. Same context. Every platform.
integrationsHeadline: Works with what you already run
integrationsSubheadline: Your agents speak to your tools. Not the other way around.
privacyHeadline: Your data. Your hardware. Your rules.
privacySubheadline: Class 1 privacy means your data never leaves your control. Choose how private you want to be.
cloudOptionDesc: Encrypted, isolated instances on our infrastructure. Your data is never used to train models. Delete anytime.
localOptionDesc: Run your agents on your own hardware. Apple Silicon, NVIDIA, or AMD. Complete air-gap possible.
enterpriseOptionDesc: NVIDIA RTX, A100, H100 — run frontier-class models entirely on-premise. No data leaves your building.
bringYourOwnDesc: Connect any model through OpenRouter. Use open-source. Use custom fine-tunes. Use whatever you trust.
privacyTagline: Fully supported by a technologist who understands why privacy matters. Not a sales team. A builder.
footerTagline: Knock down your workload. One agent at a time.
